F
FREELANCEFLOWTHE CURATED LEDGER

The curated ledger for modern freelance teams.

Manage projects, talent, invoices, and live time updates from one responsive app built for clients and freelancers.

Client and freelancer dashboards

Separate portals for hiring, project tracking, time logging, and billing.

Role-based accounts

Email/password login and signup only, no OAuth dependency.

Invoices and approvals

Approve invoices on the client side and see the status update for freelancers instantly.

Shared messages and updates

Project changes, comments, and notifications are synchronized in real time.

Demo logins: rohan@acme.com / password123 and aarav@freelanceflow.dev / password123

Sign in or create a new account with email and password.
